Basic behavioural phenomena (candidate-instrument pipeline)

Source: R/signatures.R
basic_phenomena.Rd

Reproduced behavioural phenomena that are not (yet) operationalised and literature-verified into instruments. A phenomenon graduates into aba_toolkit() once its read-out tracks the mechanism and is verified; a look-alike curve produced for the wrong reason does not qualify.

Usage

basic_phenomena()

Value

A tibble with phenomenon, status, env, shows, note.

Examples

basic_phenomena()

On this page
